name: Neon Boost
short_description: Neon Boost is a frenetic First Person Platformer based on mechanics like Rocket-Jump or Wall-Run. Run across 3 different worlds to get the best times!
detailed_description:
Neon Boost is a frenetic First Person Platformer based on mechanics like Rocket-Jump or Wall-Run. Run across 3 different worlds to get the best times!

Run, Wall-Run, Slide, and most importantly, use your weapon to Rocket - Jump and get over the obstacles!

Features

  • 72 levels (36 standard levels + 36 "Lights Off" variants)
  • Alternative Game Mode: Lights Off
  • An original Synthwave-inspired soundtrack
  • Achievements!

Play on 3 different worlds:

  • Laser City
  • Tesla World
  • Cosmic Highway

Game Mode: Lights Off

Each level has an alternative version where you have to reach the goal with limited visibility.

supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, French, German, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian
